query:
SELECT customerName, contractStartDate, MONTH(contractStartDate) as month, onboardingFeePaid 
FROM deals 
WHERE customerName IN ('Recknagel', 'Apollo', 'Machine Tool Engineering', 'C-Axis')
AND aeId IN (2, 30002)
ORDER BY customerName
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT customerName, contractStartDate, MONTH(contractStartDate) as month, onboardingFeePaid 
FROM deals 
WHERE customerName IN ('Recknagel', 'Apollo', 'Machine Tool Engineering', 'C-Axis')
AND aeId IN (2, 30002)
ORDER BY customerName
